repair_record.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_pseudo_id)
FROM (
    SELECT user_pseudo_id
    FROM "GA4"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."EVENTS_20201225"
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2021 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM TO_DATE(event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 1 AND 7
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "GA4"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."EVENTS_20201225" e2
        WHERE e2.user_pseudo_id = e1.user_pseudo_id
        AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(e2.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2021 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(e2.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM TO_DATE(e2.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 5 AND 7
        AND e2.event_params:engaged_session_event:int_value > 0
    )
    AND event_params:engaged_session_event:int_value > 0
) t1
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "GA4"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."EVENTS_20201225" e3
    WHERE e3.user_pseudo_id = t1.user_pseudo_id
    AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(e3.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2021 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(e3.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM TO_DATE(e3.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 5 AND 7
    AND e3.event_params:engaged_session_event:int_value > 0
)

repair_record.sql:
WITH CustomerPurchases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        fullVisitorId,
        visitId
    FROM
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_201707*"
    WHERE
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM
                LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) hit
            JOIN
                LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hit.eCommerceAction) action
            WHERE
                action.action_type = 2
                AND action.product_name = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
        )
),
TopSellingProduct AS (
    SELECT
        product_id,
        SUM(product_quantity) AS total_quantity
    FROM
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) hit
    JOIN
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hit.eCommerceAction) action
    WHERE
        action.action_type = 1
        AND fullVisitorId IN (SELECT fullVisitorId FROM CustomerPurchases)
        AND product_name != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
    GROUP BY
        product_id
    ORDER BY
        total_quantity DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    product_id,
    product_name,
    total_quantity
FROM
    TopSellingProduct

WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        trafficSource:"source"::TEXT AS source,
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        SUM(totals:"transactionRevenue"::NUMBER) AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160808",
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160820",
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160903",
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160905",
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160910",
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160916"
    WHERE 
        trafficSource IS NOT NULL AND
        totals:"transactionRevenue" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY 
        source, month
)
SELECT 
    source,
    ROUND(MAX(total_revenue) - MIN(total_revenue), 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM 
    MonthlyRevenue
GROUP BY 
    source

repair_record.sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT
        visitorId,
        MIN(date) AS firstVisitDate
    FROM
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_201702*"
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2
    GROUP BY
        visitorId
),
FirstTransaction AS (
    SELECT
        visitorId,
        MIN(totals.transactionRevenue) AS firstTransactionAmount,
        MIN(TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS firstTransactionDate,
        device.deviceCategory AS deviceType
    FROM
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_201702*"
    JOIN
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) hit
    LEFT JOIN
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hit.eCommmerceEvents) event
    ON
        TRUE
    WHERE
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2
        AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        visitorId, device.deviceCategory
)
SELECT
    fv.visitorId,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, fv.firstVisitDate, ft.firstTransactionDate) AS daysElapsed,
    ft.deviceType
FROM
    FirstVisit fv
JOIN
    FirstTransaction ft
ON
    fv.visitorId = ft.visitorId

WITH RevenueData AS (
    SELECT 
        trafficSource:"source"::TEXT AS source,
        SUM(totals:"totalTransactionRevenue"::NUMBER / 1000000) AS total_revenue,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(date), MAX(date)) + 1 AS days_in_period,
        COUNT(DISTINCT date) AS days_count,
        EXTRACT(WEEK FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS week_number,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month_number
    FROM 
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160822"
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '20160822' AND '20160915'
    GROUP BY 
        trafficSource:"source"::TEXT
),
TopSource AS (
    SELECT 
        source,
        total_revenue,
        days_in_period,
        days_count,
        week_number,
        month_number
    FROM 
        RevenueData
    ORDER BY 
        total_revenue DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT 
    TopSource.source,
    TopSource.total_revenue,
    TopSource.days_in_period,
    TopSource.days_count,
    MAX(CASE WHEN TopSource.week_number = week_number THEN total_revenue END) AS max_weekly_revenue,
    MAX(CASE WHEN TopSource.month_number = month_number THEN total_revenue END) AS max_monthly_revenue
FROM 
    RevenueData, TopSource

    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(totals:"transactions") >= 1 AND TRY_CAST(hits:"productRevenue" AS FLOAT) IS NOT NULL THEN 'Purchase'

repair_record.sql:
SELECT 
    t.product_name, 
    SUM(t.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM (
    SELECT 
        h.customDimensions:"value"::STRING AS product_name,
        h.eCommerceAction.action_type,
        h.eCommerceAction.products[0]:quantity::NUMBER AS quantity
    FROM 
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_201607*"
    CROSS JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.hits) AS fh
    CROSS JOIN 
        LATERAL FLATTEN(input => h.eCommerceAction.products) AS fp
    WHERE 
        h.eCommerceAction.action_type = 'purchase'
        AND h.customDimensions:"value"::STRING ILIKE '%youtube%'
        AND h.customDimensions:"value"::STRING NOT LIKE '%youtube%'
) t
GROUP BY 
    t.product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 1

repair_record.sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS NextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS MaxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20170101" s
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => s.hits) h
WHERE 
    s.date BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170131'
    AND s.trafficSource.campaign LIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND h.page.pagePath LIKE '/home/%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NOT NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_pageviews_purchase,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_pageviews_non_purchase,
    AVG(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NOT NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS avg_pageviews_purchase,
    AVG(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM 
    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160601"
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NOT NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_pageviews_purchase,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_pageviews_non_purchase,
    AVG(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NOT NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS avg_pageviews_purchase,
    AVG(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM 
    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160602"
UNION ALL
-- Repeat for all dates from June 3 to July 31
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NOT NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_pageviews_purchase,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS total_pageviews_non_purchase,

    AVG(CASE WHEN totals:transactions IS NULL THEN totals:pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS avg_pageviews_non_purchase
FROM 
    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160731"
